shell_description: Navigate between the three primary areas without crowding the interface.
shell_footer_note: Account switching and reminders will live under Settings.
landing_title: Track zakat with a calm, native-feeling app
landing_description: The public landing page stays separate from the app. Start inside the app area when you are ready.
landing_surface: This page is now the public landing page. The app shell and all app-specific routes live under /app.
home_title: Start with the latest wealth snapshot
home_description: This first shell slice gives the app a stable place to land before auth and data flows are connected.
home_next_up_body: We will wire the sign-in flow and keep these primary tabs protected for authenticated users.
history_description: This tab will eventually show previous calculations, payment state, and reminder attempts for each profile.
history_surface: Historical entries will follow the same spacing and surface rules as the rest of the app.
settings_title: Keep account setup in one place
settings_description: Profile creation, switching, delegated access, and reminder preferences will live here.
settings_surface: Account actions and preferences will use the same reusable patterns as other screens.
profiles_description: Profile management will inherit the shared iOS-style surfaces and spacing rules.
profiles_surface: Profile creation and switching will live here.
reminders_title: Feature scaffold for reminder scheduling and delivery
reminders_description: Reminder setup will reuse the same shared patterns for cards, spacing, and state feedback.
auth_title: Feature scaffold for sign-in and session management
auth_description: The auth flow will adopt the same surface, spacing, typography, and interaction rules as the rest of the app.
auth_surface: Sign-in controls will be introduced here.
wealth_title: Feature scaffold for zakatable assets and liabilities
wealth_description: The wealth snapshot flow will inherit the shared app surfaces and text treatment.
wealth_surface: Snapshot entry and review will live here.
not_found_description: The requested page could not be found.
